sections.paragraph:
- Original: μεμβράνα

- Transliteration: membrana

- Phonetic: mem-bran'-ah

- Definition:

1. parchment, made first of dressed skins at Pergamos, hence its name

- Origin: "of Latin origin ("membrane")"

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine

- Strong's: Of Latin origin (membrane); a (written) sheep skin: - parchment.
